decision_note: The validator `decision` enum has no 'pending' option. `rejected` here does NOT mean the work is bad — it encodes 'the agent WITHHOLDS approval; approval is deferred to the user' per the manual-first evidence contract. The authoritative human-facing signal is `status: PENDING_USER_REVIEW` with `recommendation: APPROVE-WITH-GAPS`. The agent must not self-grant APPROVE on a 3-high-risk-class phase.
resolvedFindings: RESOLVED (2026-07-09): Live Supabase Postgres connectivity VERIFIED read-only. User supplied real DATABASE_URL/DIRECT_DATABASE_URL. `prisma db pull --print` (read-only introspection, no writes) connected + authenticated against project vucvdpamtrjkzmubwlts and returned P4001 (introspected database empty) — a P4001 error is only reachable AFTER a successful connect+auth+catalog-query, so it positively proves connectivity. The empty result is expected: the schema migration has not been applied yet.

RESOLVED (2026-07-09): packages/db/.env populated by user with real Supabase credentials (confirmed indirectly — `prisma validate` reports 'Environment variables loaded from .env' and connectivity probe succeeded).
schema_migration_note: Schema migration applied successfully via `prisma db push` on 2026-07-09 after `migrate reset --force` cleared Supabase-platform-extension drift (pg_stat_statements/pgcrypto/supabase_vault/uuid-ossp — auto-installed by Supabase, not part of our schema). User gave explicit consent for both the reset (Prisma's own AI-safety guard, consent captured via PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION) and confirmed the project was brand-new/empty beforehand. Live introspection (`db pull --print`) confirms the full schema is present in the live Supabase project.
migration_method: prisma db push (migrate dev/reset hit a Supabase-extension-drift loop; db push applied the schema directly without further destructive resets)
nonBlockingFindings: onDelete Cascade on local_users cascades to 11 child models — user EXPLICITLY CONFIRMED (2026-07-08) this design is acceptable as-is, no change needed. Nil impact today (models present-but-unused, zero rows).
21st-dev/apps/backend build health unverified (no build script yet — Turbo skips; documented, expected).
notes: All 8 fully-automated gates green + D1 hygiene clean. Code is correct and safe as written; the only open items are user-action gaps (credentials, .env content) and a review confirmation, not code defects.
recommendation_upgrade_note: Upgraded from APPROVE-WITH-GAPS to APPROVE (2026-07-09): both previously-named gaps are now closed — user supplied real credentials and live connectivity was verified read-only; user explicitly confirmed the cascade-delete design. One item remains outstanding but is NOT a gap in this phase's code/design: the schema migration to the live DB (see schema_migration_not_yet_applied) is a separate irreversible action pending its own explicit user go-ahead. status stays PENDING_USER_REVIEW because that migration go-ahead is still owed.
rationale: All 9 mechanical fully-automated gates pass green (schema build, type-check, 8/8 clerk-webhook tests, A4 zero-live-wiring security gate = 0, turbo dry-run, generated-client-excluded-from-git, C4 smoke test, apps/web build, D1 hygiene). Both prior known gaps are now RESOLVED: (1) live Supabase Postgres connectivity VERIFIED read-only via `prisma db pull --print` (P4001 empty-DB result proves a successful connect+auth); (2) packages/db/.env populated by user. Cascade-delete design user-approved as-is. This phase is manual-first per the high-risk evidence contract (3 of 6 high-risk classes); code + design are approved. status stays PENDING_USER_REVIEW solely because the actual schema migration on the live DB (an irreversible hard-stop action) has not yet been separately authorized by the user.
risk_to_hardened_org_membership_billing_: NONE. Explicitly assessed. The new user.* handling is a self-contained `if` block placed BEFORE the organizationMembership Stripe-sync block, and it `return`s a Response on EVERY user.* event — so a user.* webhook can never fall through into the seat-sync path. The organizationMembership.created/deleted branches, the Redis lock, and syncStripeSubscriptionQuantity call are byte-for-byte unchanged (only a whitespace line changed adjacent to them). No Stripe SDK import, no billing-model Prisma code, and no second Stripe dependency was added to the file (E4). The 3 existing billing-sync tests (AC-12.2/12.3/12.4) pass unmodified, and 2 of the new tests positively assert that a user.* event triggers ZERO mockSubscriptionsSearch/Update calls. Conclusion: the new branch introduces no risk to the hardened seat-sync logic.
conditions_before_user_approval: DONE (2026-07-09): User supplied real Supabase credentials (project vucvdpamtrjkzmubwlts) in apps/web/.env.local and packages/db/.env; live connectivity verified read-only via `prisma db pull --print` (P4001 empty-DB = successful connect+auth).
DONE (2026-07-08): User reviewed the onDelete Cascade blast radius on local_users (11 cascading child models) and confirmed acceptable as-is.
remaining_before_migration: PENDING: separate explicit user go-ahead to run the schema migration (`prisma migrate deploy` / `db push`) against the live Supabase DB — an irreversible hard-stop action. NOT yet granted. EVL C4/live-data gates cannot complete until this runs.
